title: Dirtplat
description: simple mod to re-create dirt platform using mcreator, also adding a few other things like automation.
body:
This mod is still being made with mcreator, im not learning how to code [especially when it comes to java] just to make this silly mod better, dont judge :/

DIRTPLAT is a mod that lets you do a simple minigame alike skyblock, but on a 3x2 platform made of dirt instead! this mod adds multiple items not only to make it easier to do things, but also **make the game more fun** but also **add multiple new things to minecraft that adds automation!** ***[THAT DONT WORK ON THE RELEASED VERSION]***

**Stuff that you will maake a lot of probably**

Compressed dirt:
a compressed block of dirt that when broken somehow multiplies the amount of dirt you used to make it by 2.5X ? **[Just dont ask why, you truly do not wish to know]**

Raw life:
main part of the mod, probably the item youll most make **[removing compressed dirt]**, used to make grass blocks, dead life, trees, seeds, and more

Spawn egg shells:
really useful item used to make spawn eggs, make a farm, make whatever you want i guess ? *[Chickens cows and villagers... spawners too but they dont really count]*

### HOW TO MAKE A WORLD WITH THE MOD

Step 1: make a superflat world

Step 2: make structures not spawn [OPTIONAL BUT RECCOMENDED FOR GAMEPLAY]

Step 3: remove all layers from the superflat world

Step 4: create the world and run the command **/Startgame**

**congratulations! youve made a world with the mod!**


### RECCOMENDED

**Do not use shaders**

**Do not use on a normal world, it is highly reccomended using the steps that the mod has in the description to make the world instead of simply making a new world with the mod**

**Highly reccomended to NOT USE WORLD GEN MODS with the mod, this is litteraly useless and will have NO change if your trying to make a world with the steps the mod has in the desc**

### Thank you for even reading this

quick note: This mod is going trough **HEAVY REMAKE** due to me losing the original when this remake started being made This remake will add multiple new items and make the mod simply a lot harder and more grindy [Not to mention actually make automation work]

Addon to note: I recovered the original workspace, if you want me to continue making the original with the workspace with the whole origial feel of it instead of changing it a lot comment on the curseforge page of it i guess.

Yea uhh just enjoy the current version for now i guess?
